title: Distribute cold-start set via secured channel + establish baseline tracking
context: M0 is complete only when a real learner can obtain and use the cold-start fraction-tile set. Having verified PDFs in the repository is a necessary but not sufficient condition for delivery -- the set must be actively surfaced through a confirmed distribution channel with instructions attached, and a baseline outcome-tracking mechanism must be in place so the project can measure whether learners are actually reaching the printables.
objective: Upload and publish the verified cold-start fraction-tile set through the confirmed distribution channel, attach the print-and-use instructions, and establish baseline outcome tracking.
acceptanceCriteria: The fraction-tile set (all four PDFs) and print-and-use instructions are published through the channel confirmed by math-manip-research-002, with correct attribution and the channel's required license.
The listing/entry on the distribution channel is discoverable (searchable by relevant terms: 'fraction tiles', 'math manipulatives', 'printable').
A baseline tracking record is created noting the publication date, channel, URL, and the initial download/view count (or equivalent channel metric) at time of publication.
The project README and PLAN.md are updated with the distribution URL and the M0 completion date.
No license violations: only CC-BY-4.0-compatible content is published; attribution to all contributors and tools recorded.
resources: tasks/math-manip-research-002.json -- confirmed distribution channel and submission requirements
output: Published printable set on the confirmed channel (URL recorded); updated README and PLAN.md; baseline tracking record in docs/outcome-tracking.md.
